center.name: 贵亭山
center.summary: 贵亭山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Romblon boobook，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species occurs in protected areas such as Mount Guiting-Guiting but protection is lax and logging still supposedly occurs

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species occurs in protected areas such as Mount Guiting-Guiting but protection is lax and logging still supposedly occurs
